chapter_title.en: Chapter 110 – The guarantee of the loan and the entrustment

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/288)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/288)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) لَا يَضْمَنُ الْعَارِيَّةَ إِلَّا أَنْ يَكُونَ قَدِ اشْتَرَطَ فِيهَا ضَمَاناً إِلَّا الدَّنَانِيرَ فَإِنَّهَا مَضْمُونَةٌ وَ إِنْ لَمْ يَشْتَرِطْ فِيهَا ضَمَاناً .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Abdullah Bin Al Mugheira, from Abdullah Bin Sinan who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is no liability for the borrowed item except if there has been stipulation for the guarantee therein, except for the Dinars (currency), for it is under guarantee and even if there is no stipulation for a guarantee therein’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ‘ Abd Allah ibn al-Mughirah from ‘ Abd Allah ibn Sinan who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘A borrower is not held liable for the item borrowed unless it is stipulated, except dinar which brings liability even if there is no stipulation.’”
